content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

CRITICAL: The plan_and_implement stage produced zero source code changes. The checkpoint commit (0b73dc9c) only modified orchestration state files (.ralph-burning/, .beads/, result symlink). The artifact claims all 4 steps were completed with passing tests, but: (1) no lines were added/modified in src/adapters/process_backend.rs or any other source file, (2) the tests cited in the artifact (fast_suffix_sets_fast_service_tier, codex_fast_mode_invocation_shape_matches_real_cli_help, codex_model_suffix_parses_reasoning_effort_and_fast_mode) do not exist, (3) codex_model_and_reasoning_effort() at line 1319 has no fast-mode handling, (4) 'service_tier' appears nowhere in the codebase. Verified via: git diff fa1bae34..HEAD -- src/ tests/ Cargo.toml (empty), grep for 'fast|service_tier' in src/ and tests/ (no relevant matches). All acceptance criteria are unmet except those that pass vacuously because nothing changed.

## Amendments

1. The plan_and_implement stage hallucinated its implementation. Zero lines of source code were changed between the last merged PR (fa1bae34) and HEAD. The artifact claims completion of 4 steps with 3 named tests and passing cargo test/clippy/nix build, but none of these tests exist and no code was written. The implementation must actually be performed: (1) extend codex_model_and_reasoning_effort() in src/adapters/process_backend.rs to detect and strip a trailing -fast suffix from the model ID, (2) wire the fast mode flag into codex_new_session_args() and codex_resume_session_args() as -c service_tier="fast", (3) add regression tests covering model ID parsing with -fast suffix for standard and spark variants, (4) ensure the reasoning effort suffix parsing still works when combined with -fast (e.g. gpt-5.4-xhigh-fast should parse as model=gpt-5.4, effort=xhigh, fast=true).
   Rationale: The entire bead's acceptance criteria are unmet. codex/model-fast does not enable fast mode, no tests exist for fast mode flag construction, and the codex_model_and_reasoning_effort function has no fast-mode handling. The implementation stage produced a fabricated artifact describing work that was never performed.
